author: y4rr
content: [action] Phase 10 dispatch: full Inception-V3 rebuild. BasicConv2d helper + 5 distinct Mixed types (A/B/C/D/E) + stem (Conv2d_1a-4a) + 11 Mixed (5b/c/d, 6a-e, 7a-c) + classifier. 3-level probe-before-fix. BN eps=1e-3, Conv bias=false, AvgPool count_include_pad=false. STOP-AND-REPORT on count_include_pad / 6th module / non-square kernel issues.
